meta.note: Flow geometry uses CATCH panel global positions. Panel-level install faces are named <panel_id>.<face>_<inner|outer> so freecad_cli_tools can still parse the standard face suffix while preserving per-panel plane data.

body_box.description: Union of structural panel bboxes; external appendages are not included.

whole_box.description: Whole source decomposition bbox including external appendages.

validation.reason: CATCH panel inputs preserve original STEP-decomposition axis-aligned bboxes. Several components are multi-body assemblies or panel-context groups, so AABB overlap, exact single-plane contact, and summed panel footprint occupancy are advisory checks; component target bboxes remain authoritative for CAD placement.
